resources.string: Paste one share line (vless://, ss://, hysteria2://, …). Example list: github.com/igareck/vpn-configs-for-russia — copy a single URI locally, do not commit it to git.
Could not save profile: storage is not ready. Restart the app.
Could not save profile: failed to serialize. Try another share link.
Could not save profile: native storage (MMKV) failed. Reinstall the app.
Need activity context for VPN permission
VPN permission was not granted (dialog dismissed or denied).
Save a profile first: paste a share URI, tap Save profile, then Start VPN.
VPN core reported a start failure (no details).
